title: Ubiquiti AF60-XR, UISP airFiber 60 XR, price per piece
description: AirFiber 60 XR (AF60-XR) is a 60GHz point-to-point (PtP) device from Ubiquiti with long range up to 15+ km and is ideal for ISPs looking to maximize point-to-point speeds with cost-effective equipment. The unit is also equipped with an integrated GPS module and a Bluetooth interface for easy setup using a mobile app. A big benefit is also the 5GHz backup , which uses a parabola to receive the signal, when the antenna gain for 5GHz is 26dBi 60GHz spectrum with low interference - 57 to 71 GHz Supported channels: 58 320, 59 400, 60 480, 61 560, 62 640, 63 720, 64 800, 65 880, 66 960, 68 040, 69 120 MHz - support depends on the regulation in the country used Supported 60GHz channel widths: 2 160, 1 080 MHz High gain parabolic antenna 5GHz backup using parabolic antenna - 26 dBi (7° / 7°) Range 15+ km - depends on regulation in the country used Throughput up to 2.5 Gbps 10G SGP+ port Built-in GPS Planning support in the ISP Design Center application Simple setting of mobile applications via Bluetooth Device (unit with radome) Parabolic antenna PoE power adapter 48V / 0.65A Power cord Holder
